description: You are a research programmer at an atmospheric science lab. Migrate the legacy weather data processing library 'weather_analysis' located at ~/PycharmProjects/weather_analysis from Python 2.7 to Python 3.11. Ensure all tests in the tests/ directory pass by fixing Python 2 compatibility issues within the weather/ package, such as print statements, dictionary iteration, unicode strings, exception syntax, and changed built-ins. Do not modify the test files or data files, and maintain the original functionality.
